name: ASRock H510M-HDV/M.2 SE Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200 - Intel H510 Chipset - Support DDR4-3200 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 1x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - HDMI 2.0 - DVI-D - D-Sub - Realtek Gigabit LAN
shortName: ASRock H510M-HDV/M.2 SE Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200
description: Entry-level micro-ATX motherboard for Intel LGA1200 socket with H510 chipset, DDR4 support, and basic connectivity options.
